title: Set subitem column mandatory in monday form
excerpt: Is there a way to set subitem column to be mandatory in a form?

posts.author: rivkam (Rivka)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to set subitem column to be mandatory in a form?

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
Not natively, at least at this time. You can make the subitem itself mandatory, but they could skip columns. What’s your use case? Maybe we can help come up with another idea?

Desiree - www.thecleverclovers.com
